name: Beacon Hill Clam Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the horseradish, lemon juice, and cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Add clam juice from the can, blending it into the mixture until smooth.
4. Stir in the drained clams.
5. If needed, add more clam juice to achieve the desired consistency.
6. Serve with chips.
